---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Component

New component or existing one? (e.g. new DateRangePicker, or improve Select)

## Description

What do you want and why?

## Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

## Proposed Solution

How you think it should work. Code examples, API sketches, or mockups welcome.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds you've tried or other approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Links to similar implementations in other libraries, screenshots, etc.
